name: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG
description: The high-performance-network team is responsible for the development and maintenance of network acceleration technology in openeuler community

name: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG maintains 25 repositories in the Networking domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The high-performance-network team is responsible for the development and maintenance of network acceleration technology in openeuler community. The SIG has 19 core members and maintains 25 repositories in the Networking domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at high-performance-network@openeuler.org dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG maintains 25 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-high-performance-network.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: huangliming, wuchangye, liuxin. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
